title: Parkside Harmony Rehearsal & Guest Night!
description: We’re excited to be back at it this week — and we’ve got a special rehearsal night just for guests... more

title: Parkside Melody Rehearsal and Guest Night
description:
Whether you're new to barbershop or a barbershop veteran, we would love to have you join us on the risers!
Come to our Guest Night on Monday, August 25, 2025 from 7-10 pm to see what we're all about! You'll work on a song or two with us, we'll get to know each other, and just have some fun ringing chords!
We'll be at our regular rehearsal location, Christ Presbyterian Church. Sign up using the form below to get more information:
https://forms.gle/YTPrWoZkMNK53mfg9
